/ TELEMAC-2D v9 oil-spill module cas keywords (M2-spike-proven 2026-07-18).
/ The steering file's PRESENCE auto-activates the module (lecdon_telemac2d.f);
/ release location/time live in the user_fortran OIL_FLOT override.
/ M2 OIL-SPILL SPIKE: steering file presence AUTO-ACTIVATES the module (v9);
/ release via user_fortran OIL_FLOT at LT=60 around the dye source point.
FORTRAN FILE                    = user_fortran
OIL SPILL STEERING FILE         = oil_spill.txt
MAXIMUM NUMBER OF DROGUES       = 100
PRINTOUT PERIOD FOR DROGUES     = 60
ASCII DROGUES FILE              = drogues.txt
